mapper.insert: insert into post_tbl ( member_id, title, content, visibility, emotion_id, created_at, deleted_yn ) values ( #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{visibility}, #{emotionId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), 'N' )
mapper.select: select hashtag_id from hashtag where hashtag = #{hashtag} limit 1

select p.post_id as postId, p.member_id as memberId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.post_id = #{postId} and p.deleted_yn = 'N' limit 1
mapper.update: update post_tbl set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, emotion_id = #{emotionId}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: select p.post_id as postId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' order by p.created_at desc limit 50

select p.post_id as postId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name) as author, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.member_id = #{memberId} order by p.created_at desc limit 50
